_nextComponentIndexOrDeferredEntityCount

The next component index or deferred gameObject count

private int _nextComponentIndexOrDeferredEntityCount

Field Value

int

Remarks

You can think of this as a discrimminated union. Next component index is the non-deferred count of a normal archetype. Deferred gameObject count is the total number of deferred entities, some of which may be stored directly on the normal archetype.
